slides.title: International Initiatives for Holistic Wellbeing and Inclusive Social Development.
slides.subtitle: Facilitating access to basic social welfare needs and the Penta-Helix model of partnerships on social projects for sustainable development. And scaling up international social work research, advocacy, policies and programs for holistic well-being.
